title: Flower Doubling
description: Allows duplicating Small Flowers with Bonemeal.
body:
This mod allows duplicating small flowers with bonemeal.

 

I tried to replicate the "[Flora Doubling](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flourish)" mod as best as I could, but left out the option for large flowers as these are already duplicatable with bonemeal in vanilla Minecraft.

I added different versions using this list variable, for versions 1.19.4, 1.19.2 and 1.18.2

To add more flowers, use the configuration file in “config/flower_doubling/”.

I created several commands to add more flowers/fertilizers to a list you select. You can also make entries manually, the lists are in “config/flower_doubling/”.

List 1 will be automatically expanded if "Biomes O'Plenty" and/or "Blue Skies" are installed.
